headline: Is DoorDash (DASH) Quietly Redefining Its Margin Story With Robots And Ads Beyond Restaurants?
summary: In recent days, Barclays highlighted that autonomous robots and drones could cut delivery costs to roughly US$1 per order, positioning DoorDash as an early beneficiary thanks to its existing automation partnerships, while DoorDash and Criteo expanded their advertising collaboration into Canada across grocery and retail. Together, these developments point to DoorDash simultaneously pursuing lower-cost fulfillment through automation and higher-margin revenue through an enlarged advertising...
